title: bihai elongata
intro: Bihai elongata, also known as Bihai or Chinese Club Moss, is a type of vascular plant that belongs to the family Lycopodiaceae. It has been used in traditional Chinese medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antibacterial properties, making it effective in treating various health issues. The health benefits of Bihai elongata include reducing fever, relieving pain, and improving respiratory conditions, as well as having antioxidant and anti-cancer properties. In herbal preparations, Bihai elongata is often used in teas, infusions, and capsules, and is also used topically to treat skin conditions and wounds.
